1.title: raft-proxy.application.ready.time
1.query:
timeseries time = avg(raft-proxy.application.ready.time),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(time) desc
| limit 20

2.title: raft-proxy.application.started.time
2.query:
timeseries time = avg(raft-proxy.application.started.time),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(time) desc
| limit 20
